summary: Agenesis refers to the complete failure of a body part from forming during embryonic stages due to missing precursor cells. This results directly when necessary developmental precursors are absent and thus leads to lack of formation of organs like kidneys, lungs etc., depending upon which stage they fail at their development process. The specific name given here fits perfectly under this scenario where entire structures do not form because initial stem-like cells needed were never present initially themselves. \boxed{\text{A}}
